meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve Debugging
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome debugging hurdles. A beginner-friendly checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for students.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting cryptic errors alone. By leveraging the Antigravity project template combined with Claude Code, you gain an autonomous diagnostic engine. This workflow turns debugging from a roadblock into a learning loop, allowing you to visualize stack traces, isolate logic failures, and refactor code with expert-level precision immediately.
content.intro:
The screen flickers with a wall of red text—a 'TypeError' that feels like a brick wall between you and your vision. You've spent hours hunting for a missing bracket or a logic flaw, and the frustration is mounting. Every developer has stood at this precipice, staring at code that refuses to run, feeling the weight of the gap between their ambition and their technical execution.

But the era of manual, line-by-line guesswork is over. With the Antigravity project template, you are no longer just writing code; you are deploying an architecture designed for resilience and rapid diagnosis. By pairing this framework with Claude Code, you transform your development environment into a collaborative sandbox where errors become opportunities for deep learning.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Environment
steps.description: Set up your workspace using the Antigravity boilerplate to ensure standard directory structure and error-handling defaults are in place.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity boilerplate with strict TypeScript and ESLint configurations.

steps.title: Automate Error Tracing
steps.description: Configure the project to capture stack traces automatically so you can feed precise logs into Claude Code for immediate analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup a global error boundary and logger that outputs structured JSON for all runtime exceptions.

steps.title: Diagnostic Loop Integration
steps.description: Connect your local environment to the Claude Code CLI to enable real-time analysis of your current directory's state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Explain the current logic flow in the main entry point and identify potential bottlenecks.

steps.title: Isolate and Refactor
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform surgical refactoring on the specific modules where the debugger is failing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the authentication module to be more modular and easier to test.

steps.title: Validate with Unit Tests
steps.description: Generate automated tests for your fixes to ensure the bug does not regress during future development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test cases for the newly refactored authentication module covering edge cases.

pro_tips: Always ask Claude to 'explain the why' behind a fix to turn debugging into a permanent skill upgrade.
Use the 'diff' feature in Claude Code to review every change before committing to your repository.
Keep your Antigravity templates updated weekly to benefit from the latest security patches and performance optimizations.
Treat your error logs as data; feed them back into the AI to identify recurring patterns in your own coding mistakes.
Use scoped prompts—ask for a solution for 'only this function' to avoid the AI over-engineering your entire codebase.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is stable, begin integrating external APIs to challenge your error-handling logic and build a robust portfolio.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to crush bugs and ship faster than 90% of developers. Don't let the next error stop your momentum. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
